title: alyssum campestre subsp. strigosum
intro: Alyssum campestre subsp. strigosum, also known as mountain candytuft, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to help reduce inflammation. The health benefits of mountain candytuft include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of mountain candytuft can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of ailments.
